KEINEMOD-STRIKE_KEINE.title: Strike
KEINEMOD-DEFEND_KEINE.title: Defend
KEINEMOD-TIDES_OF_TIME.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have no [gold]Full Moon[/gold], [gold]Time Shift[/gold] {TimeShiftPower:diff()}.
KEINEMOD-TIDES_OF_TIME.title: Tides of Time
KEINEMOD-MANIPULATE_HISTORY.title: Manipulate History
KEINEMOD-RESHAPE_HISTORY.title: Reshape History
KEINEMOD-SCROLL_OF_VALOR.title: Scroll of Valor
KEINEMOD-HEAVENLY_SWORD.title: Heavenly Sword
KEINEMOD-SCROLL_OF_BENEVOLENCE.title: Scroll of Benevolence
KEINEMOD-CURVED_JEWEL.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].{RetainBlock:cond:>0?
[gold]Block[/gold] is retained for a turn.|}
KEINEMOD-CURVED_JEWEL.title: Curved Jewel
KEINEMOD-SCROLL_OF_WISDOM.title: Scroll of Wisdom
KEINEMOD-EIGHT_SPAN_MIRROR.description: This turn, your next {MirroredPower:plural:Attack or Skill is|{:diff()} Attacks or Skills are} played an extra time.
KEINEMOD-EIGHT_SPAN_MIRROR.title: Eight-Span Mirror
KEINEMOD-FLOW.title: Flow
KEINEMOD-FATIGUE.title: Fatigue
KEINEMOD-SLAY_THE_SERPENT.title: Slay the Serpent
KEINEMOD-KEINE_AHNUNG.title: Keine Ahnung
KEINEMOD-THE_SMARTEST.description:
Does NOTHING!
[gold]Consumed[/gold]: If costs 0, [gold]Transform[/gold] this into [gold]THE STRONGEST[/gold]; Otherwise, does not move to [gold]Scroll[/gold], reduce cost by {CostReduction:diff()} instead.
KEINEMOD-THE_SMARTEST.title: THE SMARTEST
KEINEMOD-THE_STRONGEST.description: At the end of your turn, deal {PerfectFreezePower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
KEINEMOD-THE_STRONGEST.title: THE STRONGEST
KEINEMOD-BURETSU_CRISIS.title: Buretsu Crisis
KEINEMOD-MASAKADO_CRISIS.title: Masakado Crisis
KEINEMOD-YOSHIMITSU_CRISIS.title: Yoshimitsu Crisis
KEINEMOD-GHQ_CRISIS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for: {HumanSec}{HumanOpen}Human{HumanClose}: each card in your [gold]Scroll[/gold];{HumanSecEnd} {HakuSec}{HakuOpen}Hakutaku{HakuClose}: each other card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].{HakuSecEnd}{InCombat: (Hits {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:time|times})|}
Cost {Energy:energyIcons()} less for each card you [gold]Consumed[/gold] this combat.
KEINEMOD-GHQ_CRISIS.title: GHQ Crisis
KEINEMOD-LEISURE.title: Leisure
KEINEMOD-NEW_SEMESTER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {KnowledgePower:diff()} [gold]Knowledge[/gold] if you have less than {Threshold:diff()}; Otherwise, draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
KEINEMOD-NEW_SEMESTER.title: New Semester
KEINEMOD-PHASE_STRIKE.title: Phase Strike
KEINEMOD-LONG_READ.title: Long Read
KEINEMOD-HEADBUTT_KEINE.title: HEADBUTT!!
KEINEMOD-SCOLD.title: Scold
KEINEMOD-PENETRATING_GAZE.title: Penetrating Gaze
KEINEMOD-REVISION_SESSION.title: Revision Session
KEINEMOD-RESERVED_TIME.title: Reserved Time
KEINEMOD-SWIRL_OF_HISTORY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {HistoricalGapPower:diff()} [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Consumed[/gold]: Apply {Consumed:diff()} [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] to ALL enemies.
KEINEMOD-SWIRL_OF_HISTORY.title: Swirl of History
KEINEMOD-FLOW_OF_HISTORY.title: Flow of History
KEINEMOD-DUAL_FORM.description: Your cards' {HumanOpen}Human{HumanClose} and {HakuOpen}Hakutaku{HakuClose} effects are considered triggered simultaneously at ALL time.
KEINEMOD-DUAL_FORM.title: Dual Form
KEINEMOD-CONCEAL.title: Conceal
KEINEMOD-BORROWED_TREASURES.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose a [gold]Sacred Scroll[/gold] to [gold]Create[/gold].
KEINEMOD-BORROWED_TREASURES.title: Borrowed Treasures
KEINEMOD-THREE_SACRED_TREASURES_SWORD.de:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Your next [gold]Heavenly Sword[/gold] hits an additional time.
[gold]Create[/gold] a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Scroll of Valor+|Scroll of Valor}[/gold].
KEINEMOD-THREE_SACRED_TREASURES_ORB.desc:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Your next [gold]Curved Jewel[/gold] retains your [gold]Block[/gold] for a turn.
[gold]Create[/gold] a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Scroll of Benevolence+|Scroll of Benevolence}[/gold].
KEINEMOD-THREE_SACRED_TREASURES_MIRROR.d:
Your [gold]Eight-Span Mirrors[/gold] cost {Energy:energyIcons()} less.
[gold]Create[/gold] a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Scroll of Wisdom+|Scroll of Wisdom}[/gold].
Whenever you [gold]Consume[/gold] a [gold]Sacred Scroll[/gold], gain {TreasureOfCountryPower:diff()} of its [gold]Sacred Power[/gold].
[gold]Create[/gold] ALL 3 [gold]Sacred Scrolls[/gold].
KEINEMOD-INTERTWINED.description:
[gold]Create[/gold] a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Scroll of Benevolence+|Scroll of Benevolence}[/gold] and a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Scroll of Valor+|Scroll of Valor}[/gold].
Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
KEINEMOD-INTERTWINED.title: Intertwined
KEINEMOD-GOOD_APPLE_BAD_APPLE.title: Good Apple Bad Apple
KEINEMOD-SCROLL_SLASH.title: Scroll Slash
KEINEMOD-SCROLL_STORM.title: Scroll Storm
KEINEMOD-UNOFFICIAL_HISTORY.title: Unofficial History
KEINEMOD-WELL_READ.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Cost {Energy:energyIcons()} less for each card in your [gold]Scroll[/gold].
KEINEMOD-WELL_READ.title: Well-Read
KEINEMOD-LEARN_FROM_PAIN.title: Learn from Pain
KEINEMOD-KNOWLEDGE_GAP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply 1 [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] for every {Ratio:diff)()} damage dealt.
KEINEMOD-KNOWLEDGE_GAP.title: Knowledge Gap
KEINEMOD-LEXICOGRAPHY.title: Lexicography
KEINEMOD-SIPHONING_HISTORY.description:
Remove enemy's [gold]Historical Gap[/gold]. Enemy loses 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] for every {Ratio:diff()} removed.
{HakuSec}{HakuOpen}Hakutaku{HakuClose}: [gold]Create[/gold] a [gold]Splitting History[/gold] to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].{HakuSecEnd}
KEINEMOD-SIPHONING_HISTORY.title: Siphoning History
KEINEMOD-SPLITTING_HISTORY.description: {InCombat:Apply {HistoricalGapPower:diff()} [gold]Historical Gap[/gold].|Apply [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] equal to the amount removed.}
KEINEMOD-SPLITTING_HISTORY.title: Splitting History
KEINEMOD-OVERWORKED.title: Overworked
KEINEMOD-FORBIDDEN_KNOWLEDGE.title: Forbidden Knowledge
KEINEMOD-FADING_PAST.title: Fading Past
KEINEMOD-HISTORY_OF_UNTRODDEN.descriptio: At the start of your turn, apply {HistoryOfUntroddenPower:diff()} [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] to ALL enemies.
KEINEMOD-HISTORY_OF_UNTRODDEN.title: History of Untrodden Land
KEINEMOD-HISTORY_OF_FANTASY.description: Whenever you generate a card, apply {HistoryOfFantasyPower:diff()} [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] to a random enemy.
KEINEMOD-HISTORY_OF_FANTASY.title: History of Fantasy
KEINEMOD-FEAST_OF_HISTORY.title: Feast of History
KEINEMOD-FEAST_OF_HISTORY.artist: ナウファル・ドリーマー
KEINEMOD-ANCIENT_PROTECTION.title: Ancient Protection
KEINEMOD-SIDES_OF_THE_MOON.title: Sides of the Moon
KEINEMOD-FLOWER_OF_EDO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Consumed[/gold]: Increase damage by {Increase:diff()} this combat.
[gold]Recalled[/gold]: Does not gain [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
KEINEMOD-FLOWER_OF_EDO.title: Flower of Edo
KEINEMOD-YAMATO_KINGDOM.title: Yamato Kingdom
KEINEMOD-LAND_OF_RISING_SUN.description: {HakuSec}{HakuOpen}Hakutaku{HakuClose}: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Exit your form, you cannot enter [green]Hakutaku[/green] form for {SunrisePower:diff()} turns.{HakuSecEnd}
KEINEMOD-LAND_OF_RISING_SUN.title: Land of Rising Sun
KEINEMOD-SCROLL_DANCE.description: At the start of your turn, choose a [gold]Sacred Scroll[/gold] to [gold]Create[/gold].
KEINEMOD-SCROLL_DANCE.title: Scroll Dance
KEINEMOD-BRAINSTORM.description: [gold]Create[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:an [gold]Upgraded[/gold]|an} Attack and {IfUpgraded:show:an [gold]Upgraded[/gold]|a} [gold]Block[/gold] Skill from other characters. They gain [gold]Knowledgeable[/gold].
KEINEMOD-BRAINSTORM.title: Brainstorm
KEINEMOD-BRAINSTORM.extraTipDescription: You may target another player to prioritize cards from their character. Target yourself for the original effect.
KEINEMOD-FOREIGN_KNOWLEDGE.description: Choose 1 of 3 Attacks from other characters to [gold]Create[/gold]. It gains [gold]Knowledgeable[/gold].
KEINEMOD-FOREIGN_KNOWLEDGE.title: Foreign Knowledge
KEINEMOD-FOREIGN_KNOWLEDGE.extraTipDescr: You may target another player to prioritize cards from their character. Target yourself for the original effect.
KEINEMOD-TOTAL_PURIFICATION.description:
{HumanSec}{HumanOpen}Human{HumanClose}: [gold]Consume[/gold] ALL your Statuses and Curses.{HumanSecEnd}
{HakuSec}{HakuOpen}Hakutaku{HakuClose}: Remove ALL your debuffs.{HakuSecEnd}
KEINEMOD-TOTAL_PURIFICATION.title: Total Purification
KEINEMOD-PHANTASMAL_EMPEROR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
Lose {KnowledgePower:diff()} [gold]Knowledge[/gold].
KEINEMOD-PHANTASMAL_EMPEROR.title: Phantasmal Emperor
KEINEMOD-KNOWLEDGE_BASE.description: Whenever you generate a Non-Status card, gain {KnowledgeBasePower:diff()} [gold]Knowledge[/gold].
KEINEMOD-KNOWLEDGE_BASE.title: Knowledge Base
KEINEMOD-PASSAGE_OF_TIME.title: Passage of Time
KEINEMOD-EPHEMERALITY137.description:
Apply {EphemeralityPower:diff()} [gold]Ephemerality[/gold] to ALL enemies.
{IfUpgraded:show:Put|Shuffle} this {IfUpgraded:show:onto the top of|into} your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
[gold]Consumed[/gold]: Apply {EphemeralityPower:diff()} [gold]Ephemerality[/gold] to ALL enemies. Add a copy of this {IfUpgraded:show:onto the top of|into} your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
KEINEMOD-EPHEMERALITY137.title: Ephemerality 137
KEINEMOD-LEGEND_OF_GENSOKYO.description: At the start of your turn, choose 1 of 3 Attacks or [gold]Block[/gold] Skills from other characters to [gold]Create[/gold] with [gold]Knowledgeable[/gold].
KEINEMOD-LEGEND_OF_GENSOKYO.title: Legend of Gensokyo
KEINEMOD-ERUDITE.description:
Your [gold]Hand Size[/gold] is increased by {EruditePower:diff()}.
Gain {KnowledgePower:diff()} [gold]Knowledge[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
KEINEMOD-ERUDITE.title: Erudite
KEINEMOD-BACK_TO_THE_FUTURE.description:
[gold]Time Shift[/gold] {TimeShiftPower:diff()}.
{HumanSec}{HumanOpen}Human{HumanClose}: Look at the top {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Consume[/gold] any of them. Draw 1 card.{HumanSecEnd}
KEINEMOD-BACK_TO_THE_FUTURE.title: Back to the Future
KEINEMOD-WORKFLOW.title: Workflow
KEINEMOD-SERENE_NIGHT.title: Serene Night
KEINEMOD-FIRST_PYRAMID.title: First Pyramid
KEINEMOD-MOON_SHIFT.description:
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} equal to your [gold]Full Moon[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: plus 1|}.{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedEnergy:diff()} {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)})|}
KEINEMOD-MOON_SHIFT.title: Moon Shift
KEINEMOD-RAIN_OF_SHOWA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:time|times}.
Hits {RepeatExtra:diff()} additional time for each [gold]Flow[/gold] in your [gold]Scroll[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
[gold]Create[/gold] {Cards:diff()} [gold]{Cards:plural:Flow|Flows}[/gold].
KEINEMOD-RAIN_OF_SHOWA.title: Rain of Showa
KEINEMOD-GO_WITH_THE_FLOW.title: Go with the Flow
KEINEMOD-GUARDIAN.description:
ALL players gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
{HakuSec}{HakuOpen}Hakutaku{HakuClose}: And retain [gold]Block[/gold] for a turn.{HakuSecEnd}
KEINEMOD-GUARDIAN.title: Guardian
KEINEMOD-GUARDIAN.extraTipDescription: The effects on ally [red]The Immortal[/red] are doubled.
KEINEMOD-BESTIAL_INSTINCT.description: You and another player: Gain {BestialInstinctPower:diff()} [gold]Bestial Instinct[/gold], [gold]Time Shift[/gold] {TimeShiftPower:diff()}.
KEINEMOD-BESTIAL_INSTINCT.title: Bestial Instinct
KEINEMOD-BESTIAL_INSTINCT.extraTipDescri: If targeted [red]The Immortal[/red], both of you gain [blue]2[/blue] additional [gold]Bestial Instinct[/gold].
KEINEMOD-WIPED_FROM_HISTORY.title: Wiped from History
KEINEMOD-OVERWRITE.title: Overwrite
KEINEMOD-DECONSTRUCTION.description:
{HumanSec}{HumanOpen}Human{HumanClose}: [gold]Consume[/gold] {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.{HumanSecEnd}
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Shuffle this into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
After playing this {CountNeeded:diff()} times, [gold]Transform[/gold] this into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Reconstruction+|Reconstruction}[/gold] when drawn.
KEINEMOD-DECONSTRUCTION.title: Deconstruction
KEINEMOD-RECONSTRUCTION.description: Add a copy of a card in your [gold]Scroll[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It gains [gold]Ethereal[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
KEINEMOD-RECONSTRUCTION.title: Reconstruction
KEINEMOD-THE_SCALE_GROWS.description:
At the end of your turn, gain {TheScaleGrowsPower:diff()} [gold]Knowledge[/gold].
When your [gold]Knowledge[/gold] reaches {StackOverflowPower:diff()}, die.
KEINEMOD-THE_SCALE_GROWS.title: The Scale Grows...
KEINEMOD-GUIDANCE.title: Guidance
KEINEMOD-GUIDANCE.extraTipDescription: If targeted [red]The Immortal[/red], they get [gold]Upgraded[/gold] copies.
KEINEMOD-INTERNALIZE.description: Whenever you [gold]Consume[/gold] a card, gain {InternalizePower:diff()} [gold]Valor[/gold] and [gold]Benevolence[/gold].
KEINEMOD-INTERNALIZE.title: Internalize
KEINEMOD-AMATERASU.title: Amaterasu
KEINEMOD-DETERMINATION.title: Determination
KEINEMOD-SACRED_STRIKE.description:
[gold]Create[/gold] a [gold]Scroll of Valor[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Sacred Scroll[/gold] or [gold]Sacred Treasure[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Scroll[/gold].
KEINEMOD-SACRED_STRIKE.title: Sacred Strike
KEINEMOD-KNOWLEDGE_IS_POWER.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Knowledge[/gold], gain {KnowledgeIsPowerPower:plural:|{} times }that much [gold]Strength[/gold].
KEINEMOD-KNOWLEDGE_IS_POWER.title: Knowledge is Power
KEINEMOD-ENERGY_OUTBURST.title: Energy Outburst
KEINEMOD-REINCARNATION.title: Reincarnation
KEINEMOD-RETURNING_BRIDGE.title: Returning Bridge
KEINEMOD-PAST.title: Past
KEINEMOD-FUTURE.title: Future
KEINEMOD-HORRIFIC_PURSUIT.description:
Approach.
Decrease [gold]Sandpit[/gold] by 1.
When drawn, draw 1 card.
KEINEMOD-HORRIFIC_PURSUIT.title: Horrific Pursuit
KEINEMOD-AN_AFTERLIFE_ODYSSEY.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Consumed[/gold]: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to the lowest-HP enemy.
Whenever ANYONE dies, return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
KEINEMOD-AN_AFTERLIFE_ODYSSEY.title: An Afterlife Odyssey
KEINEMOD-YESTERDAY_ONCE_MORE.description:
[gold]Recall[/gold] {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
When next Non-[gold]Yesterday-Once-More[/gold] card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], [gold]Consume[/gold] a copy of it.
KEINEMOD-YESTERDAY_ONCE_MORE.title: Yesterday Once More
KEINEMOD-CRIMSON_NIGHT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Apply {CalculatedVulnerable:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
[gold]Vulnerable[/gold] amount also scales with [gold]Knowledge[/gold].
KEINEMOD-CRIMSON_NIGHT.title: Crimson Night
KEINEMOD-DETACHMENT.title: Detachment
KEINEMOD-GODS_REALM.description: Whenever you [gold]Consume[/gold] or [gold]Create[/gold] a card, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it. If it already is [gold]Upgraded[/gold], gain {GodsRealmPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
KEINEMOD-GODS_REALM.title: God's Realm
